# Jedox

> Jedox provides enterprise performance management (EPM) and financial planning & analysis (FP&A) software for planning, budgeting, AI-powered forecasting and scenario planning, consolidation, and management reporting. It connects strategic, operational, and tactical plans to enable integrated business planning (IBP) across the organization.

## Sitemaps
- [XML Sitemap](https://www.jedox.com/sitemap_index.xml): Includes all crawlable and indexable pages.

## Posts
- [Best FP&A software: evaluation criteria and top considerations](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/best-fpa-software/): Evaluation criteria, architecture needs, integrations, and usability factors when choosing FP&A software.
- [Gartner insights: financial planning software trends](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/gartner-insights-financial-planning-software/): Key analyst insights and market trends to guide selection of financial planning software.
- [Top 5 FP&A Trends 2026: From Reporting to Value Creation](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/fpa-trends/): Explore the top FP&A trends in 2026 and learn how they can help your finance team drive value and stay competitive.
- [What is FP&A? Definition, process, and benefits](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/what-is-fpa/): Understand FP&A roles, processes, and deliverables, and how modern teams drive strategy with data and models.
- [Finance business partner: role, skills, and impact](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/business-partner/): Finance business partner role, skills, and practices to influence strategy and create measurable value.
- [Financial KPIs: essential metrics for performance management](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/financial-kpis/): Essential financial KPIs, how to interpret them, and aligning metrics with business objectives and outcomes.
- [Key driver analysis: improve forecasting with driver-based planning](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/key-driver-analysis/): Identify and quantify value drivers to enhance scenario modeling, sensitivity analysis, and forecast accuracy.
- [Top-down vs bottom-up planning: pros, cons, and when to use](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/top-down-bottom-up-planning/): Compares top-down and bottom-up planning, governance implications, and when to combine approaches in driver-based models.
- [Operational planning: frameworks, examples, and execution](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/operational-planning/): Operational planning frameworks and examples linking strategy to execution with clear targets, initiatives, and resources.
- [What is CapEx? Definition, examples, and planning](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/what-is-capex/): Learn what CapEx is, examples, budgeting and approvals, depreciation effects, and best practices for planning.
- [What is EPM? Enterprise performance management explained](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/what-is-epm/): Overview of EPM, including planning, consolidation, reporting, and aligning strategy to execution across the enterprise.
- [Single source of truth in finance: definition and benefits](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/single-source-of-truth/): Define a single source of truth, governance requirements, integrations, and benefits for consistent, trusted reporting.
- [Rolling forecasts: how they work and why they matter](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/rolling-forecasts/): How rolling forecasts work, cadence and drivers, and why they outperform static annual budgets in volatility.
- [Digital business partnering in finance: practices and tools](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/digital-business-partnering/): How finance business partners use analytics, automation, and storytelling to influence decisions and drive performance.
- [The potential of hyperautomation in finance](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/potential-of-hyperautomation/): Hyperautomation in finance combines RPA, AI, and orchestration to streamline processes and reduce errors.
- [Autonomous finance in organizations: concepts and use cases](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/autonomous-finance-in-organizations/): Autonomous finance concepts, enabling technologies, practical use cases, and steps toward touchless planning and forecasting.
- [Scenario planning: a practical guide for finance teams](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/scenario-planning/): Scenario planning fundamentals, identifying drivers and assumptions, and modeling uncertainty to inform resilient decisions.
- [Integrated business planning implementation: steps and best practices](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/integrated-business-planning-implementation/): Implement IBP, align S&OP and finance, govern data, and measure value across teams.
- [ESG data management: collecting, governing, and reporting ESG metrics](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/esg-data-management/): Capture, govern, and report ESG data with the right controls, systems, and processes for compliance and insight.
- [Accounting balance sheet: structure, examples, and analysis](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/accounting-balance-sheet/): Balance sheet structure - assets, liabilities, equity - and how to analyze financial position and risk.
- [Scenario planning process: steps, templates, and tips](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/scenario-planning-process/): Step-by-step scenario planning process, templates, governance, and tips to build robust, testable models.
- [Profit and loss statement: basics, examples, and analysis](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/profit-and-loss/): P&L basics, revenue and expense structure, margin analysis, and insights for performance management.
- [Cash flow: statements, forecasting, and management](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/cash-flow/): Cash flow statements, forecasting methods, liquidity levers, and practices to strengthen resilience and visibility.
- [Real-time data in performance management: use cases and value](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/real-time-data-performance-management/): Use real-time data, alerts, and dashboards to accelerate decisions and improve forecast accuracy and accountability.
- [Forecast error metrics: how to evaluate forecasts](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/error-metrics-how-to-evaluate-forecasts/): Explains MAPE, MAE, RMSE, and bias, with guidance on applying error metrics to improve forecasts.
- [The 5 S&OP maturity levels: assessment and roadmap](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/5-sop-maturity-levels/): The five S&OP maturity levels explained, with assessment criteria and steps to advance process and data.
- [What is xP&A? Extended planning and analysis explained](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/what-is-xpa/): What xP&A is and how connected planning extends FP&A across functions for integrated, driver-based decisions.
- [What is OLAP? Online analytical processing explained](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/what-is-olap/): OLAP concepts, cubes, and dimensions, and how multidimensional analysis powers planning and reporting.
- [Reporting and analysis: methods, dashboards, and best practices](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/reporting-analysis/): Reporting frameworks, KPI design, dashboards, and governance practices for reliable, actionable insights.
- [Activity-based budgeting: definition, steps, and examples](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/activity-based-budgeting/): Activity-based budgeting fundamentals, cost drivers, and linking activities to resources and outcomes.
- [Why traditional budgeting methods are failing](https://www.jedox.com/en/blog/why-traditional-budgeting-methods-are-failing/): Why annual budgets fall short and how rolling, driver-based planning delivers agility and accountability.

## Solutions
- [Solutions overview](https://www.jedox.com/en/solutions/): Explore all Jedox solutions across FP&A, xP&A, and industry use cases.

### Priority solutions
- [Financial Planning and Analysis (FP&A)](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/): Unified budgeting, forecasting, and analysis across P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow.
- [Budgeting and Forecasting Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/budgeting-forecasting-software/): Build rolling forecasts and annual budgets with driver-based planning and automation.
- [Integrated Financial Planning](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/integrated-financial-planning/): Connect P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow for consistent, end-to-end financial plans.
- [Scenario Planning Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/scenario-planning-software/): Model best/base/worst cases and sensitivities to navigate uncertainty with confidence.
- [Financial Reporting Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/financial-reporting-software/): Create governed financial statements and disclosures with drill-through and auditability.
- [Financial Consolidation Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/financial-consolidation-software/): Automate group consolidation, eliminations, and close processes for faster, compliant reporting.
- [Integrated Business Planning (IBP)](https://www.jedox.com/en/integrated-business-planning/): Align finance with demand, supply, and operations in a single planning framework.
- [Management Reporting Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/management-reporting-software/): Standardize executive dashboards and operational reports with governance and commentary.
- [EPM Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/epm-software/): Enterprise performance management for planning, consolidation, reporting, and analytics.

### Additional solutions
- [Cash Flow Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/cash-flow-software/): Forecast liquidity and working capital using direct/indirect methods and driver-based models.
- [Revenue Planning Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/revenue-planning-software/): Predict revenue by product, channel, or region with pricing and volume drivers.
- [OpEx Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/opex-software/): Plan operating expenses by cost center, driver, and scenario with collaborative workflows.
- [CapEx Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/capex-software/): Prioritize investments with approvals, depreciation modeling, and ROI tracking.
- [Profit and Loss (P&L) Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/profit-and-loss-software/): Plan and analyze revenue and cost drivers to optimize margins and profitability.
- [Balance Sheet Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/balance-sheet-software/): Model assets, liabilities, and equity with links to P&L and cash flow.
- [Cost Allocation Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/cost-allocation-software/): Allocate shared costs transparently using rules, drivers, and audit trails.
- [Financial Analysis Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/financial-analysis-software/): Evaluate performance with variance, trend, and scenario analysis across dimensions.
- [Financial Modeling Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/financial-modeling-software/): Build flexible, driver-based models integrated with source systems and Excel.
- [Profitability Analysis Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/profitability-analysis-software/): Measure product, customer, and segment profitability to inform pricing and mix.
- [ESG Reporting Software](https://www.jedox.com/en/financial-planning-analysis/esg-reporting-software/): Collect, govern, and report ESG metrics with standardized frameworks and audit trails.
- [HR and Workforce Planning](https://www.jedox.com/en/hr-workforce/): Plan headcount, compensation, and capacity with position-level detail and approvals.
- [Sales Performance Management](https://www.jedox.com/en/sales-performance-management/): Plan quotas, territories, incentives, and pipeline to drive sales outcomes.
- [Sales and Operations Planning (S&OP)](https://www.jedox.com/en/sop/): Balance demand, supply, and finance to improve service levels, cost, and margin.
- [Industry Solutions](https://www.jedox.com/en/industry/): Explore industry-specific planning models, blueprints, and accelerators.

## Platform

### Priority platform pages
- [User Experience](https://www.jedox.com/en/platform/user-experience/): Intuitive planning across web, Microsoft 365 add-ins, Canvas dashboards, and reporting with structured, interactive, governed collaboration.
- [Excel Experience](https://www.jedox.com/en/platform/excel/): Excel-like planning in the browser and Excel add-in on live OLAP data with formulas, shortcuts, writeback, and governance.
- [Data Integration](https://www.jedox.com/en/platform/integration/): Connect systems with flexible connectors, automate pipelines, and unify your data foundation to power FP&A decisions.
- [Modeling](https://www.jedox.com/en/platform/modeling/): Build finance-owned, driver-based models, turn assumptions into scenarios, and stay audit-ready with governance and controls.
- [JedoxAI](https://www.jedox.com/en/platform/ai/): AI agents identify patterns, understand context, and deliver insights for reporting, knowledge, modeling, and planning.
- [Mobile App](https://www.jedox.com/en/platform/mobile/): Access reports and scenarios, update budgets and forecasts, and accelerate approvals anywhere with secure mobile workflows.

### Additional platform pages
- [Subscriptions and Packages](https://www.jedox.com/en/platform/pricing/): Compare subscription packages and scale with add-ons and upgrades to match requirements, user types, and growth.
- [Jedox Marketplace](marketplace.jedox.com/): Find add-ons, connectors, and extensions to expand integrations and accelerate deployment and adoption.

## Company
- [About Jedox](https://www.jedox.com/en/about/): Overview hub for company information, mission, values, leadership links, and corporate resources.
- [Company](https://www.jedox.com/en/about/company/): Company profile with mission, leadership, governance, history, and how Jedox creates customer value.
- [Locations](https://www.jedox.com/en/about/locations/): Global offices and headquarters with addresses, directions, and regional contact information links.
- [Contact](https://www.jedox.com/en/contact/): Sales and general inquiries, demo requests, partner contacts, and regional contact details.
- [Support](https://www.jedox.com/en/services/support/): Knowledge base, documentation, release notes, and customer support options for Jedox products.
